home.exhibitionsSubtitle: Each gallery opens a solo exhibition for Gallery Weekend Irekiak.
home.toursSubtitle: Three curated, free-of-charge itineraries that walk you through the galleries. Booking recommended.
home.aboutShort: Irekiak Gallery Weekend is the official Donostia gallery weekend. Launched in 2010, organised by DAGGE, Tabakalera and DonostiKultura.

home.title: Irekiak - Gallery Weekend Donostia / San Sebastián
home.description: Irekiak Gallery Weekend, the official art gallery weekend event of Donostia. Guided tours, exhibitions and cultural programme.
